# Known Issues / Test Exceptions Report — P&lt;NN&gt;

> Required whenever a **non-critical** test fails or is deferred (Master Plan
> §9.3, Hard Constraint H-11). Critical classes — architecture consistency,
> data integrity, security, recovery, core functionality, regression — are
> **not** eligible for exception and must pass.

For each item:

## ISSUE-P&lt;NN&gt;-&lt;n&gt;: &lt;title&gt;

- **Affected test / area:** &lt;test id or component&gt;
- **Why non-critical:** &lt;reasoning; confirm it does not affect core function,
  security, data integrity, or recovery&gt;
- **Root cause:** &lt;…&gt;
- **Impact / scope:** &lt;who/what is affected&gt;
- **Risk level:** low / medium / high
- **Temporary mitigation:** &lt;…&gt;
- **Repair plan:** &lt;…&gt;
- **Target phase:** P&lt;NN&gt;
